name: Mulligan's Golf & Fun Center
about: Mulligan's Golf & Fun Center is an indoor facility featuring private themed suites with digital golf simulations, sports shooting games, virtual reality, and arcade entertainment. The venue provides a climate-controlled environment for individuals and groups to play golf on famous courses or engage in other recreational activities. Self-service booking is emphasized, with guests handling basic responsibilities like cleaning up and securing the space. It is locally owned and established since 2020, positioning itself as a family-friendly attraction and local favorite.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple themed private suites for a customizable group experience
State-of-the-art technology with accurate shot tracking and feedback
Access to hundreds of famous and iconic golf courses worldwide
Self-service model allows for flexible and easy booking
Suites accommodate various group sizes for casual or competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: Guests can bring their own food (BYOB is explicitly stated)
Guests can bring their own drinks (BYOB is explicitly stated)

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as an available program for golf play in the Maldives suite

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, and guests are encouraged to bring their own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for 18 holes. However, it mentions that guests can play solo or with friends in private suites, and the experience is tailored to group needs.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Mulligan's is kid-friendly, offering party packages for various ages and describing itself as a fun activity for families with children.
